# FallKard · Sovereign Card Game

**Home:** https://sjgant80-hub.github.io/fallkard/
**Publisher:** AI-Native Solutions · House of the Fall
**License:** MIT
**Nature:** Sovereign, browser-native, WebRTC-PvP, single-file playable, MIT-signed

## What FallKard is

A sovereign collectible card game where every tool in the AI-Native Solutions estate (1212 sovereign SDKs, APIs, MCP servers, tools, surfaces, and wellness apps) is a real, playable, ownable, forkable card.

- Diablo 2 Resurrected aesthetics (dark oxblood, sockets, runewords, Horadric Cube, Charms, Uber events, ladders, seasons)
- Hearthstone lane combat (3 lanes × 2 rows, mana curve, cost/atk/hp)
- $KONO NFT economy (fn ASSET mints, auction house, gambling, disenchant → shards, reroll bones)
- Every card links to the real tool it represents; playing a card can actually open the tool

## Machine-readable resources

- `cards.json` — 1212 cards · full derived stats · seal · rarity/chamber/kind distribution
- `manifest.json` — rules, kinds, chambers, sets, runes, runewords, ability overrides
- `art/<id>.svg` — procedural card art (300×420) for every tool
- `build-summary.json` — build statistics (rarities, chamber counts)
- `catalog.md` — full card catalog for LLM ingestion
- `glossary.md` — in-game term dictionary
- `faq.md` — public questions and answers
- `sitemap.xml` — full URL set
- `robots.txt` — crawl rules

## Key mechanics

**Kinds → Shapes (RPS ring):** SDK (Forge) · API (Signal) · MCP (Loom) · Tool (Blade) · Surface (Arch) · Wellness (Well). SDK beats Tool. Tool beats MCP. MCP beats SDK. API beats Wellness. Wellness beats Surface. Surface beats API.

**Rarity tiers (D2R-mapped):**
- Common (White · bone)
- Magic (Blue)
- Rare (Yellow)
- Unique (Gold · flagship)
- Set (Green)
- Uber Unique (Dark Gold · Genesis · 1-of-1)
- Runeword (Rainbow/Orange · crafted)
- Charm (Violet · passive)

**Chambers (9 macro sets):** Market · Colony · Estate · Vault · Clinic · Studio · Forge · Reach · Bridge.

**Runes (9):** El (+1 ATK) · Eld (+1 HP) · Tir (mana on play) · Ith (draw on play) · Nef (return on death) · Sol (silence immune) · Um (adjacent +1/+1) · Ohm (destroy on play) · Zod (indestructible).

**Runewords (10 D2R-canon):** Steel · Malice · Enigma · Faith · Enlightenment · Fortitude · Grief · Chains of Honor · Call to Arms · Heart of Wolves.

**Keywords:** Sovereign · Sealed · Fork · Trade · Marketplace · Chain · Descend · Bloodline · Shard · Seal · Underforge.

## Game modes

- Constructed (30-card deck)
- Draft — "the Delve"
- Sealed — "the Chest"
- Solo Campaign — "the Fall's Fall" (30 boss encounters across 9 chapters)
- SaaS Boss Rush — "the Great Wound" (4-player async co-op raid)
- PvP Arena — "the Coliseum" (WebRTC signed-replay)
- Tournaments — "the Court" (guild-hosted, FallBond co-signed)
- Guild Raids — "the Nine" (chamber banner competition)

## Ecosystem links

- FallMarket · https://sjgant80-hub.github.io/fallmarket/ — where every card's source tool lives
- FallColony · https://sjgant80-hub.github.io/fallcolony/ — settlement + guilds
- Estate home · https://ai-nativesolutions.com — nested-cube view of all 1212 tools
- Genesis window · 2026-08-10 — Uber Unique NFT mint block

## Sovereignty pillars

- Zero servers required to play (WebRTC PvP peer-to-peer)
- IndexedDB save state
- Ed25519-signed decks + match replays
- MIT license · code is forkable
- Card provenance == fork provenance (bloodline graph)
- Private cosmology denylist gate at build time

- Phase 0 · Foundation — SHIPPED
- Phase 1 · Collection Viewer — SHIPPED
- Phase 2 · Deck Builder — SHIPPED

- Phase 4 · Runewords + Sockets + Horadric Cube + Sets — SHIPPED
- Phase 5 · Campaign (30 bosses) — SHIPPED
- Phase 6 · PvP + Ladder — SHIPPED
- Phase 7 · $KONO Economy — SHIPPED post 2026-08-10
- Phase 8 · Guilds + Tournaments + Uber events — SHIPPED
- Phase 9 · Cross-tool triggers + Governance — SHIPPED
